name: Platform Recovery and Salvage Planner
description: Helps teams recover from under-implemented AI platforms by identifying valuable components, merging or deleting stubs, and producing phased rebuild roadmaps with real technology choices.

capabilities.name: Valuable Component Extraction
capabilities.description: Identify which parts of a stub codebase are worth keeping and which should be discarded.

capabilities.name: Component Consolidation
capabilities.description: Recommend merging redundant engines and deleting unnecessary components.

capabilities.name: Production Foundation Design
capabilities.description: Design real backend, auth, multi-tenancy, connectors, and storage architecture.

capabilities.name: AI Layer Redesign
capabilities.description: Replace keyword/template engines with LLMs, RAG, embeddings, and existing agent frameworks.

capabilities.name: Digital Twin Redesign
capabilities.description: Replace dictionary-based twins with event-driven graph models, delta history, and conflict resolution.

capabilities.name: Real Connector Design
capabilities.description: Design secure, least-privilege connectors for PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, Git, Docker, and Kubernetes.

capabilities.name: Phased Rebuild Roadmap
capabilities.description: Produce a time-boxed, team-sized, milestone-driven plan to rebuild the platform.

capabilities.name: Scope Reduction Strategy
capabilities.description: Identify the smallest valuable use case to ship first instead of rebuilding all layers.

limitations: Requires an existing due diligence review or detailed project knowledge
Cannot automatically execute the recovery plan
Recommendations assume access to a qualified engineering team

task.description: Recovery objective (e.g., full rebuild, scope reduction, foundation design)

due_diligence_report.description: Structured findings from a prior review

constraints.description: Budget, team size, timeline, existing infrastructure

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial platform recovery skill derived from OAIOS salvage recommendations
